description: A suite holder wants to place their food and beverage order for an upcoming event.

nodes.task_description: Send the suite catering menu to the client.
Receive the completed order from the client.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the list of desired food and beverage items.

nodes.task_description: Place the order with the catering department.

expected_outcome.value: Agent submits the order to catering.

nodes.task_description: Send a confirmation and the invoice for the order to the client.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the order and sends the bill.
